name: Vegetable Curry
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons (or to taste) mild curry powder
4.5 oz packet TVP® chunks or 4 vegetable burgers, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large soup pan over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped vegetables and toss them in the butter for a few minutes.
3. Stir in the curry powder, brown sugar, soy sauce, and TVP® chunks (or vegetable burgers). Mix well.
4. Pour in water or vegetable stock until the mixture is covered.
5. Cover the pan and cook over medium heat until the vegetables are tender. Stir occasionally to prevent burning.
6. Serve immediately, but note that this dish will also taste good after standing for an hour before reheating or serving cold.
Source: Home Cooking by Linda McCartney
